Class IuTransactionManager

java.lang.Object
edu.iu.transaction.IuTransactionManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.transaction.TransactionManager, jakarta.transaction.TransactionSynchronizationRegistry, jakarta.transaction.UserTransaction, AutoCloseable
public final class IuTransactionManager extends Object implements jakarta.transaction.TransactionManager, jakarta.transaction.UserTransaction, jakarta.transaction.TransactionSynchronizationRegistry, AutoCloseable
Portable virtual transaction manager implementation.

    Constructor
    Description
    IuTransactionManager()
    Default constructor.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    begin()
     
    void
    clearThreadState()
    Clears the transaction state from the current thread, as a final safeguard, to be invoked after all transaction resources should have been released, and before returning the thread for reuse.

  • Constructor Details

    • IuTransactionManager

      public IuTransactionManager()
      Default constructor.

  • Method Details

    • clearThreadState

      public void clearThreadState()
      Clears the transaction state from the current thread, as a final safeguard, to be invoked after all transaction resources should have been released, and before returning the thread for reuse.

    • visit

      public <V> Optional<V> visit(Function<IuTransaction, Optional<V>> transactionVisitor)
      Visits IuTransaction managed by this instance.
      Type Parameters:
      V - optional return type
      Parameters:
      transactionVisitor - visitor function
      Returns:
      visitor result

    • subscribe

      public edu.iu.IuAsynchronousSubscription<IuTransaction> subscribe()
      Subscribes to an internally controlled subject of incomplete transactions.

      After initial traversal, IuTransaction references will be provided by the subject on status change, including change to completed statuses Status.STATUS_NO_TRANSACTION, Status.STATUS_COMMITTED, and Status.STATUS_ROLLEDBACK.

      Returns:
      IuAsynchronousSubscription of all open transactions
      See Also:
      • IuAsynchronousSubject.subscribe()

      Specified by:
